name: Can Despawn
patterns: %livingentities% can despawn (on chunk unload|when far away)
%livingentities% can('t| not) despawn (on chunk unload|when far away)

name: Can Fly
neoMatch: %player% can fly / %player% (can't fly|cannot fly|can not fly)

name: Comparison
patterns: (1¦neither|) %objects% ((is|are)(|2¦(n't| not|4¦ neither)) (greater|more|higher|bigger|larger|above) [than] or (equal to|the same as)|\>=) %objects%
(1¦neither|) %objects% ((is|are)(|2¦(n't| not|4¦ neither)) (less|smaller|lower|below) [than] or (equal to|the same as)|\<=) %objects%
(1¦neither|) %objects@-1% (was|were)(|2¦(n't| not|4¦ neither)) (greater|more|higher|bigger|larger|above) [than] or (equal to|the same as) %objects%
(1¦neither|) %objects@-1% (was|were)(|2¦(n't| not|4¦ neither)) (less|smaller|lower|below) [than] or (equal to|the same as) %objects%
(1¦neither|) %objects@1% (will be|2¦(will (not|4¦neither) be|won't be)) (greater|more|higher|bigger|larger|above) [than] or (equal to|the same as) %objects%
(1¦neither|) %objects@1% (will be|2¦(will (not|4¦neither) be|won't be)) (less|smaller|lower|below) [than] or (equal to|the same as) %objects%
neoMatch: %object% (is greater than|is more than|>) %object% / %object% (is less than|<) %object% / %object% (is|are|is equal to|=) %object% / etc.

name: Damage Source - Does Scale With Difficulty
patterns: %damagesources% (do not|don't|does not|doesn't) scale damage with difficulty
%damagesources%'[s] damage (do not|don't|does not|doesn't) scale with difficulty

name: Enderman Has Been Stared At
patterns: %livingentities% (don't|doesn't|do not|does not) have been stared at

name: Entity is in Liquid
neoMatch: %player% is in water / %player% is in lava

name: Entity Storage Is Full
patterns: [the] entity storage of %blocks% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) full

name: Equippable Component - Can Be Sheared Off
Equippable Component - Can Equip On Entities
Equippable Component - Can Swap Equipment
patterns: %equippablecomponents% can swap equipment [on right click|when right clicked]
%equippablecomponents% (can't|cannot|can not) swap equipment [on right click|when right clicked]

name: Goat Has Horns
patterns: %livingentities% (has|have) ((any|a) horn|left:[a] left horn[s]|right:[a] right horn[s]|both:both horns)
%livingentities% (doesn't|does not|do not|don't) have ((any|a) horn|left:[a] left horn[s]|right:[a] right horn[s]|both:both horns)

name: Has Line of Sight
patterns: %livingentities% does(n't| not) have [a] [direct] line of sight to %entities/locations%

name: Has Permission
neoMatch: %player% has permission %string% / %player% (doesn't have|does not have|lacks) permission %string%

name: Is Custom Name Visible
patterns: custom name of %entities% (isn't|is not|are not|aren't) visible

name: Is Evenly Divisible By
patterns: %numbers% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) evenly divisible by %number% [with [a] tolerance [of] %-number%]
%numbers% can be evenly divided by %number% [with [a] tolerance [of] %-number%]

name: Is Fish Hook in Open Water
Is Incendiary
patterns: %entities% ((is not|are not|isn't|aren't) incendiary|(does not|do not|doesn't|don't) cause[s] a[n] (incendiary|fiery) explosion)

name: Item Has Enchantment Glint Override
patterns: %itemtypes% (doesn't|don't|do not|does not) have enchantment glint overrid(den|e)

name: Text Display Has Drop Shadow
patterns: [[the] text of] %displays% (doesn't|does not|do not|don't) have [a] (drop|text) shadow

name: Will Despawn
patterns: %itementities% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) going to (despawn naturally|naturally despawn)

name: Ban
patterns: ban [kick:and kick] %strings/offlineplayers% [(by reason of|because [of]|on account of|due to) %-textcomponent%] [for %-timespan%]
ban [kick:and kick] %players% by IP [(by reason of|because [of]|on account of|due to) %-textcomponent%] [for %-timespan%]
IP(-| )ban [kick:and kick] %players% [(by reason of|because [of]|on account of|due to) %-textcomponent%] [for %-timespan%]

name: Change: Set/Add/Remove/Remove All/Delete/Reset
neoMatch: set %object% to %object% / add %object% to %object% / remove %object% from %object% / (delete|clear|reset) %object%

name: Consume Brewing Fuel
patterns: prevent [the] brewing stand from consuming [its|the] fuel

name: Enchant/Disenchant
patterns: [naturally|randomly] enchant %~itemtypes% at level %number%[treasure:[,] allowing treasure enchant[ment]s]

name: Entity Despawn
patterns: make %livingentities% despawn[able] (on chunk unload|when far away)
force %livingentities% to despawn (on chunk unload|when far away)
prevent %livingentities% from despawning [on chunk unload|when far away]

name: Equippable Component - Equip On Entities
patterns: allow %equippablecomponents% to be equipped on[to] entities

name: Equippable Component - Lose Durability
patterns: make %equippablecomponents% not (lose durability|be damaged) (on [wearer['s]] injury|when [[the] wearer [is]] (hurt|injured|damaged))

name: Equippable Component - Shear Off
patterns: allow %equippablecomponents% to be sheared off [of entities]

name: Equippable Component - Swap Equipment
patterns: (allow|force) %equippablecomponents% to swap equipment [on right click|when right clicked]
(make|let) %equippablecomponents% swap equipment [on right click|when right clicked]
(block|prevent|disallow) %equippablecomponents% from swapping equipment [on right click|when right clicked]
make %equippablecomponents% not swap equipment [on right click|when right clicked]

name: Kick
patterns: kick %players% [(by reason of|because [of]|on account of|due to) %-textcomponent%]

name: Locally Suppress Warning
patterns: [local[ly]] suppress [the] (conflict|variable save|missing conjunction|deprecated syntax|"starting with expression") warning[s]

name: Replace
since: 2.0, 2.2-dev24 (multiple strings, items in inventory), 2.5 (replace first, case sensitivity), 2.10 (regex)
patterns: replace [(all|every)|first:[the] first] %strings% in %strings% with %string% [case:with case sensitivity]
replace [(all|every)|first:[the] first] %strings% with %string% in %strings% [case:with case sensitivity]

name: Rotate
patterns: rotate %quaternions/displays% by x %number%, y %number%(, [and]| and) z %number%

name: Send Resource Pack
patterns: send [the] resource pack [from [[the] URL]] %string% with hash %string% to %players%

name: Toggle Picking Up Items
patterns: allow %livingentities% to pick([ ]up items| items up)

name: Wake And Sleep
patterns: force %players% to (start sleeping|[go to] sleep) %direction% %location% (force:with force)
force %players% to (stop sleeping|wake up) (spawn:without spawn [location] update)

name: Cooldown Time/Remaining Time/Elapsed Time/Last Usage/Bypass Permission
Coordinate
neoMatch: x[-coordinate] of %location% / y[-coordinate] of %location% / z[-coordinate] of %location%

name: Display Name
since: before 2.1, 2.2-dev20 (inventory name), 2.4 (non-living entity support, changeable inventory name)

name: Elements
neoMatch: first element [out] of %objects% / last element [out] of %objects% / random element [out] of %objects%

name: Entities
patterns: [(all [[of] the]|the)] entities of type[s] %entitydatas% in radius %number% (of|around) %location%
[(all [[of] the]|the)] entities of type[s] %entitydatas% within %location% and %location%

name: Game Effects with Data
patterns: <dynamic patterns based on registered data game effects>

name: Health
neoMatch: set health of %player% to %number% (effect implies settable/gettable expression)

name: IP
since: 1.4, 2.2-dev26 (when used in connect event), 2.3 (when used in server list ping event)

name: Lowest/Highest Solid Block
since: 2.2-dev34, 2.9.0 (lowest solid block, 'non-air' option removed, additional syntax option)

name: Name
since: before 2.1, 2.2-dev20 (inventory name), 2.4 (non-living entity support, changeable inventory name), 2.7 (worlds)

name: Name / Display Name / Tab List Name
Particles with Data
patterns: <dynamic patterns based on registered data particles, e.g. "[%-*number%|a[n]] <particle pattern>">

name: Potion Effect of Entity/Item
patterns: [:active|:hidden|both:(active and hidden|hidden and active)] %potioneffecttypes% [potion] effect[s] of %livingentities/itemtypes%

name: Potion Effects of Entity/Item
patterns: [:active|:hidden|both:(active and hidden|hidden and active)] potion effects of %livingentities/itemtypes%
%livingentities/itemtypes%'[s] [:active|:hidden|both:(active and hidden|hidden and active)] potion effects

name: Rotated Quaternion/Vector
patterns: %quaternions% rotated by x %number%, y %number%(, [and]| and) z %number%

name: Vectors - Create Location from Vector
patterns: %vector% [to location] in %world% with yaw %number% and pitch %number%
location (from|of) %vector% in %world% with yaw %number% and pitch %number%

name: Vectors - Vector from Yaw and Pitch
WXYZ Component/Coordinate
neoMatch: x[-coordinate] of %location% / y[-coordinate] of %location% / z[-coordinate] of %location%

name: clamp
patterns: clamp(values: numbers, min: number, max: number)

name: date
patterns: date(year: number, month: number, day: number, hour: number = 0, minute: number = 0, second: number = 0, millisecond: number = 0, zone_offset: number = NaN, dst_offset: number = NaN)

name: location
patterns: location(x: number, y: number, z: number, world: world = (default world), yaw: number = 0, pitch: number = 0)

name: quaternion
patterns: quaternion(w: number, x: number, y: number, z: number)

name: rgb
patterns: rgb(red: integer, green: integer, blue: integer, alpha: integer = 255)

name: vector
patterns: vector(x: number, y: number, z: number)
